positive: A highly stylized and symmetrical composition featuring a celestial hummingbird hovering amidst glowing bioluminescent tropical flora. The design should incorporate clean, thick silhouette elements, intricate line art, and geometric patterns suggestive of ancient maps. Elements include glowing nebula dust, ornate tropical leaves (like stylized monstera and philodendron), and delicate stylized jungle vines framing the central hummingbird. High contrast deep sapphire blue, vibrant emerald green, and accents of glowing gold and electric violet. Flat vector aesthetic, tattoo design quality, centered composition, studio lighting, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, lowres, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, smudges, dirty, jpeg artifacts
